description_long: This stuffed toy is modeled after the popular character Charmander, featuring a rounded orange body with a cream-colored belly and large, expressive green eyes. Its head is oversized compared to its body, giving it a cute and playful appearance, and it has a wide, open-mouthed smile with visible teeth. The toy's arms are short and slightly bent, while its legs are stubby and end in three white claws. A long, tapering tail extends from the back, tipped with a stylized flame in shades of red, orange, and cream. The surface appears soft and plush, typical of stuffed toys, with minimal visible seams and a matte finish. The overall design is simple yet highly recognizable, making it appealing for children and collectors alike.
description: A soft, plush Charmander stuffed toy with a rounded orange body, large green eyes, and a flame-tipped tail. It has a wide smile, short limbs, and a cream-colored belly.
description_view_0: Front view shows the toy's large green eyes, wide smile with visible teeth, cream-colored belly, and both arms and legs facing forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rounded head, protruding snout, short arm, and the full length of the tail with its flame tip.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, body, and the tail with its flame tip, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, snout, short arm, and the tail with its flame tip.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with large, wide-open green eyes and a broad, open-mouthed smile showing small teeth. The overall look is inviting and playful.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms slightly bent and held forward, legs apart for balance, and the tail extended behind with the flame tip visible.
